notes: Captured standalone from the GitHub release asset usd_optimize_usd_25.11_py_3.12 (version 1.0.4, manylinux_2_35_x86_64 release; build-specific suffix omitted) via UsdOptimizeCore.getInstance().getOperations() (PYTHONPATH=<pkg>/python:<pkg>/usdpy, LD_LIBRARY_PATH=<pkg>/lib:<pkg>/extraLibs, system Python 3.12.3). 47 operations: the 110.0.4 snapshot's 44 plus deduplicateHierarchies, findOverlappingMeshes, shrinkwrap. so_build_date is the 1.0.4 release-notes date (2026-06-09); the package exposes no buildTime. so_extension_version is the release semver - 1.0.x replaced the 110.x scheme when Usd Optimize was renamed to Usd Optimize.
